data.en: How was your weekend?
data.cn: 你的周末过得怎么样？
data.hint: Wh- question for past state / 询问过去状态的疑问句

data.en: It was a terrible day.
data.cn: 那真是糟糕的一天。
data.hint: Past 'be' verb / be动词的过去式

data.en: I got on the wrong bus.
data.cn: 我上错了公交车。
data.hint: Past tense of 'get' / get的过去式

data.en: I left my book on the bus too.
data.cn: 我也把书落在了公交车上。
data.hint: Past tense of 'leave' / leave的过去式

data.en: Some tourists asked me the way.
data.cn: 一些游客向我问路。
data.hint: Regular past verb (+ed) / 规则动词过去式

data.en: I gave them the wrong directions.
data.cn: 我给他们指错了方向。
data.hint: Past tense of 'give' / give的过去式

data.en: I was late to meet my friends.
data.cn: 我去见朋友迟到了。
data.hint: Past 'be' verb with 'I' / 与I连用的be动词过去式

data.en: I didn't mean to do that.
data.cn: 我不是故意那样做的。
data.hint: Negative past auxiliary / 助动词过去式的否定

data.en: I only realized it after they left.
data.cn: 他们在离开后我才意识到。
data.hint: Past tense 'left' / 过去式left

data.en: What happened to you?
data.cn: 你发生了什么事？
data.hint: Question word as subject / 疑问词作主语

data.en: I visited the science museum yesterday.
data.cn: 我昨天参观了科学博物馆。
data.hint: Time word at the end / 时间状语放在句末
accept: Yesterday I visited the science museum.

data.en: Did you see anything interesting?
data.cn: 你看到什么有趣的东西了吗？
data.hint: Did + base verb / Did + 动词原形

data.en: Yes, there was a space exhibition.
data.cn: 是的，那里有一个太空展览。
data.hint: Past 'there be' / 过去时的there be句型

data.en: You could go inside the rooms.
data.cn: 你可以进到房间里面去。
data.hint: Past of 'can' / can的过去式

data.en: We learnt how astronauts live and work.
data.cn: 我们了解到宇航员是如何生活和工作的。
data.hint: Question word + clause / 疑问词+从句

data.en: Were there any astronauts there?
data.cn: 那里有宇航员吗？
data.hint: Plural past 'there be' question / 复数there be的疑问句

data.en: There were no astronauts, but there were robots.
data.cn: 那里没有宇航员，但有机器人。
data.hint: Plural past 'be' / be动词复数过去式

data.en: I asked one of them questions.
data.cn: 我问了其中一个（机器人）问题。
data.hint: Pronoun 'them' / 代词宾格them

data.en: It answered me!
data.cn: 它回答了我！
data.hint: Regular past verb / 规则动词过去式

data.en: It was a day to remember.
data.cn: 那是值得纪念的一天。
data.hint: Infinitive as adjective / 不定式作后置定语

data.en: Our class went to a wastewater plant.
data.cn: 我们班去了一家污水处理厂。
data.hint: Past tense of 'go' / go的过去式

data.en: It was not boring at all.
data.cn: 它一点也不无聊。
data.hint: not... at all / 根本不...

data.en: The plant makes dirty water clean again.
data.cn: 这家工厂把脏水再次变干净。
data.hint: make + object + adj. / make+宾语+形容词

data.en: First, dirty water goes into the plant.
data.cn: 首先，脏水进入工厂。
data.hint: Present tense for facts / 描述事实用一般现在时

data.en: Special screens remove large pieces of waste.
data.cn: 特殊的筛网去除大块的废弃物。
data.hint: Plural subject 'screens' / 复数主语screens

data.en: Then large machines clean the water.
data.cn: 然后大型机器清洁水。
data.hint: Adjective before noun / 形容词在名词前

data.en: They remove germs and other small things.
data.cn: 它们去除细菌和其他微小物质。
data.hint: Plural 'germs' / 名词复数germs

data.en: These things are usually too small to see.
data.cn: 这些东西通常太小而看不见。
data.hint: too... to... / 太...而不能...

data.en: It takes a few more steps.
data.cn: 还需要几个步骤。
data.hint: 'take' for process/time / take表示花费(时间、过程)

data.en: I didn't realize it was so hard.
data.cn: 我之前没意识到这这么困难。
data.hint: didn't + base verb / didn't+动词原形

data.en: We went on a school trip to a farm.
data.cn: 我们去农场进行了一次学校旅行。
data.hint: go on a trip / 去旅行

data.en: There were large tents with fruits and vegetables.
data.cn: 那里有装满水果和蔬菜的大帐篷。
data.hint: Preposition 'with' / 介词with

data.en: The farmer told us about the plants.
data.cn: 农夫告诉了我们关于植物的事。
data.hint: Past tense of 'tell' / tell的过去式

data.en: Then we got straight to work.
data.cn: 然后我们直接开始工作。
data.hint: get to work / 开始工作

data.en: First, we picked some strawberries.
data.cn: 首先，我们摘了一些草莓。
data.hint: Regular past verb (+ed) / 规则动词过去式

data.en: Slowly, we filled many baskets.
data.cn: 慢慢地，我们装满了许多篮子。
data.hint: Adverb of manner / 方式副词

data.en: The farmer taught us how to cut branches.
data.cn: 农夫教我们如何剪树枝。
data.hint: how + to verb / how+不定式

data.en: Finally, we watered the plants.
data.cn: 最后，我们给植物浇了水。
data.hint: 'water' as a verb / water作动词(浇水)

data.en: Farming isn't easy!
data.cn: 务农不容易！
data.hint: Gerund as subject / 动名词作主语

data.en: Every grain comes from hard work.
data.cn: 粒粒皆辛苦。/每一粒谷物都来自辛勤劳动。
data.hint: Singular subject 'Every' / Every后接单数名词

data.en: There was a total solar eclipse in Wuhan.
data.cn: 武汉出现了一次日全食。
data.hint: Past 'there be' / 过去时的there be句型

data.en: I woke up early today.
data.cn: 我今天醒得很早。
data.hint: Past tense of 'wake' / wake的过去式

data.en: I couldn't wait to see it.
data.cn: 我迫不及待地想看到它。
data.hint: Past of 'can not' / can not的过去式

data.en: We took cameras, chairs, and special glasses.
data.cn: 我们带了相机、椅子和特殊的眼镜。
data.hint: Past tense of 'take' / take的过去式

data.en: Slowly, the moon moved in front of the sun.
data.cn: 慢慢地，月亮移到了太阳前面。
data.hint: Prepositional phrase / 介词短语 in front of

data.en: It got darker and darker.
data.cn: 天变得越来越暗。
data.hint: Comparative + and + comparative / 比较级+and+比较级

data.en: The sky went dark.
data.cn: 天空变暗了。
data.hint: Past tense of 'go' (become) / go的过去式(表示变得)

data.en: The light made a ring around the moon.
data.cn: 光在月亮周围形成了一个光环。
data.hint: Past tense of 'make' / make的过去式

data.en: The total eclipse lasted for over five minutes.
data.cn: 日全食持续了五分钟以上。
data.hint: Regular past verb 'lasted' / 规则动词过去式lasted

data.en: I want to become an astronomer someday.
data.cn: 我想有一天成为一名天文学家。
data.hint: want to + verb / want to + 动词原形
accept: Someday I want to become an astronomer.
